name: lint-script-run
assertion: The agent must run start-here-lint.mjs before committing

name: ts-script-run
assertion: The agent must run start-here-ts.mjs before committing

name: build-before-push
assertion: The agent must run npm run build before committing

name: droplet-rsync
assertion: The agent must use rsync to push the built site to the DigitalOcean Droplet
